description: Request payload for updating a collection. Only the fields supplied in the request payload will have an effect. Only one of `add`, `move`, and `remove` can be non-empty in a single request.

name.description: The human-readable name of the collection.

public.description: `true` if the collection should be visible to all users, `false` otherwise.

add.description: Add the specified items to the collection. Multiple items can be specified.

remove.description: Remove the item at this position from the collection. Multiple items can be specified.
